raw: The MassParks Pass entitles the bearer to free parking for one vehicle (excluding buses or vans) at over 50 facilities in the Massachusetts State Parks system that charge a day-use parking fee, with the exception of camping and excluding Quabbin Reservoir, Squantum Point, NorthPoint, or Draw Seven Commuter Lots. Check out www.mass.gov/dcr for a full listing of MassParks locations. Once you have reserved this pass, you may pick it up on the day before OR day of your reservation. This pass is returnable and must be returned the day of its use, as other patrons may be waiting to use it. Please return to the outside bookdrop.
